summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DE'CLIC PRO application - both backend APIs and frontend functionality are working correctly with complete questionnaire-to-results workflow functional

ui_bugs.issue: Back button has overlay interception preventing clicks
ui_bugs.impact: Users can still navigate using browser back button or direct URL navigation

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Backend profile creation via POST /api/profile
Backend profile retrieval via GET /api/profile/{id}
Backend job matching via POST /api/matching-jobs (dynamic calculation)
Backend get all jobs via GET /api/jobs
Frontend homepage loading with DE'CLIC PRO title
Frontend CTA buttons (start questionnaire, view identity card)
Frontend 4 feature pills display (Soft Skills, Valeurs, Potentiel, Métiers)
Frontend 4-step section display
Frontend navigation from home to questionnaire
Frontend questionnaire page loading and display
Frontend question interaction (selecting options, navigation)
Frontend progress bar functionality
Frontend complete 8-question workflow
Frontend questionnaire completion and profile submission
Frontend automatic navigation to results page
Frontend carte identité page with personalized results
Frontend soft skills, values, potential sections display
Frontend dynamic job recommendations with match percentages
End-to-end integration: questionnaire → backend profile creation → personalized results
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (5/5 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Resolve overlay interception issue with back navigation button on CarteIdentitePage (z-index or pointer-events CSS adjustment needed)
